data.title: Contact Exxonim Consult | Business Advisory Tanzania

hero.title: Reach Exxonim for registration, compliance, and advisory support.
hero.description: Use the contact route that works best for you - email, phone, or WhatsApp - and the Exxonim team will follow up promptly.

cards.label: Email
cards.description: Best for sending structured details and follow-up questions.

cards.label: Phone
cards.description: Use the direct phone path when you need a quick conversation.

cards.label: WhatsApp
cards.description: Send a message through WhatsApp and the team will respond as soon as possible.

data.metaDescription: Contact Exxonim Consult by email, phone, or WhatsApp for business registration, licensing, and compliance advisory in Tanzania.
